_comment: Phrasing templates for the Announcements feature. See dev/announcements.md §3.
Each bucket has a `balanced` list (always present, used by Balanced verbosity)
and an optional `chatty` list (longer / more conversational variants used when
the user picks Chatty). Minimal verbosity bypasses these templates and speaks
just `{name}.` directly. Translators rewrite natively, not literally.
- Minimal: bare species name only (handled by the engine).
- Balanced: short, friendly, occasionally a touch of personality. Don't
apologise for low-confidence calls — the user already saw the score.
- Chatty: a full conversational sentence, sometimes a small comment or
aside. Should feel like a birding companion, not a robot.

chatty: There's a {name} calling — first one this session.
The {name} is back, second time now.
Same {name} popping in again — they're sticking around.
Looks like the {name} has a lot to say today.
Sounds like a {name} to me — fairly confident.
I'd call that a {name}, pretty sure.
Sounds like {name} could be back for another round.
Could well be a {name}, signal's a touch faint.
Sounds a bit like a {name} — worth a second listen.
Possibly a {name} in there — keep an ear out.
I'd lean toward {name}, but it's a marginal one.
Might be a {name} — not a perfect match but plausible.
{name} is my best guess on this one.
Possibly {name} again, signal's a bit thin.
Could be {name} returning — worth keeping an ear on.
Faint match, but might be {name} once more.
Leaning toward {name} again, but not a strong call.
Quite a chorus — {name1}, {name2}, and {name3} all at once.
Three at once: {name1}, {name2}, and {name3} — busy spot.

balanced: Lots happening: {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and a few more.
chatty: Lots going on right now — {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and several more in the mix.
Busy moment — {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and a handful of others all calling.
Whole chorus going — {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and more besides.
Real activity here — {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and a few more I can pick out.
Quite a soundscape — {name1}, {name2}, {name3}, and others joining in.

_commonnessComment: Optional one-line tag-on appended (Chatty only) the *first* time a species
is announced in a session. Bin = current-week geo-model probability divided
by the top-scoring species at this location/week. The seasonal addendum is
appended only when the species is also currently below its annual peak.

abundant: A really common bird in your area.
You'll hear this one a lot around here.
Very common in your area at this time of year.
About as familiar as it gets around here.
One of the regulars in your area.
common: Fairly common in your area at this time of year.
You're in good territory for this one.
uncommon: A bit less common in your area.
Worth noting — not heard every day around here.
Bit of a treat — not too frequent in your area.
Not the everyday call around here.
rare: A bit of a rarity around here — nice catch!
Quite rare for your area, that one.
Definitely one to remember — pretty scarce around here.
seasonalAddendum: Though they're not usually around this time of year.
And a touch out of season too.
Bit early or late for them, normally.
Off-season for them, which makes it extra interesting.
Outside their usual window here, too.
